task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Costs' module is enabled for the 'Solar Energy Installation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Costs' or 'Cost reports' module is visible in the project sidebar, or the project settings page shows the 'Costs' module checked/activated.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Initial Site Survey - Residential' work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package details view for 'Initial Site Survey - Residential' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the correct cost type and enter the number of units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Log unit costs' form, the Cost type dropdown is set to 'Site Visit Flat Rate' and the Units field is set to '1' or '1.0'.

task_completion.description: Enter today's date and the required comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Log unit costs' form, the Date field shows the current date and the Comment field contains 'External surveyor invoice #9942' (or at least 'invoice #9942').

task_completion.description: Successfully save the logged cost entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Successful creation') is displayed, or the new cost entry is visible in the work package's cost history/reports with the correct details.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenProject application, not a text editor or static mockups.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, python API scripts, or SQL queries to insert the cost record directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the intermediate steps of the form being filled out before submission, rather than just jumping to a final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: 'Solar Energy Installation'. Work Package Subject: 'Initial Site Survey - Residential'. Cost Type: 'Site Visit Flat Rate'. Expected Units: 1.0. Expected Comment Fragment: 'invoice #9942'.
